channel.title: Peter Wooldridge - Blog
channel.description: Insights on AI, technology, and data leadership for executives and decision-makers.

item.title: Your Company is One Resignation Away from AI Disaster
item.content:encoded:

item.title: Navigating the Shift from Deterministic to Probabilistic Software Engineering
item.content:encoded:
Software engineering is at a crossroads. For decades, the craft has been built on deterministic foundations – where 2+2 always equals 4 and…

item.title: Building StravaTalk - A Natural Language Interface for Strava Data
